upgrades.name: Home Base
upgrades.tooltip: Creates a home base where harvesters can return to deposit gems.

upgrades.name: Harvester Count
upgrades.tooltip: The number of active harvester out collecting gems.

upgrades.name: Harvester Speed
upgrades.tooltip: Increase the movement speed of harvesters.

upgrades.name: Reset Blue Gems
upgrades.tooltip: Resets all blue gem upgrades and refunds all blue gems

upgrades.name: Harvester Collection Range
upgrades.tooltip: The radius around each harvester in which it can collect gems.

upgrades.name: Harvester Capacity
upgrades.tooltip: The maximum number of gems each harvester can carry before returning to base.

upgrades.name: Harvester Maximum Fuel
upgrades.tooltip: The maximum fuel capacity of each harvester.

upgrades.name: Harvester Refuel Speed
upgrades.tooltip: The speed at which each harvester refuels.

upgrades.name: Gem Value
upgrades.tooltip: The value of each gem collected by harvesters.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawn Cooldown
upgrades.tooltip: Determines how often gems spawn in the world.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawn Rate
upgrades.tooltip: The number of gems that spawn each cooldown period.

upgrades.name: Max Gem Count
upgrades.tooltip: The maximum number of gems that can exist in the world at once.

upgrades.name: Starting Gem Count
upgrades.tooltip: The number of gems present in the world at the start of the game.

upgrades.name: Camera Zoom Scale
upgrades.tooltip: The zoom scale of the camera.

upgrades.name: Fuel Efficiency
upgrades.tooltip: The fuel efficiency multiplier for harvesters.

upgrades.name: Passive Income
upgrades.tooltip: The amount of red gems earned passively every second (Gem value upgrades will also effect this income).

upgrades.name: Blue Gem
upgrades.tooltip: Increase the blue gem by one.

upgrades.name: Homebase Collector
upgrades.tooltip: If enabled, the homebase will automatically collect gems within its collection range.

upgrades.name: Homebase Collection Range
upgrades.tooltip: The radius around the homebase in which it can collect gems.

upgrades.name: Refuel at Homebase
upgrades.tooltip: If enabled, harvesters will refuel a portion of their maximum fuel when delivering gems at the homebase.

upgrades.name: Auto Refuel
upgrades.tooltip: If enabled, harvesters will automatically refuel when low on fuel.

upgrades.name: Speedboost
upgrades.tooltip: Enables a speedboost ability for harvesters.

upgrades.name: Homebase Magnetizer
upgrades.tooltip: Pulls gems towards the homebase. Closer gems gets pulled faster.

upgrades.name: Homebase Magnetizer: Magnitude
upgrades.tooltip: The strength of the homebase's magnet effect on nearby gems.

upgrades.name: Homebase Magnetizer: Falloff
upgrades.tooltip: Falloff strength.

upgrades.name: Homebase Magnetizer: Cooldown
upgrades.tooltip: Cooldown.

upgrades.name: Harvester Magnetizer
upgrades.tooltip: Enables a magnetizer ability for harvesters.

upgrades.name: Chain Magnetizer
upgrades.tooltip: Enables a chain magnetizer ability for the homebase.

upgrades.name: Chain Magnetizer: Cooldown
upgrades.tooltip: Enables a chain magnetizer ability for the homebase.

upgrades.name: Chain Magnetizer: Number of chains
upgrades.tooltip: Number of chains that is activated for homebase

upgrades.name: Chain Magnetizer: Harvesters
upgrades.tooltip: When Chain Magnetizer is activated, it will also activate for each harvester.

upgrades.name: Chain Magnetizer Harvesters: Count
upgrades.tooltip: Number of chains activated for harvesters

upgrades.name: Drones
upgrades.tooltip: Deploys drones to assist harvesters in collecting gems.

upgrades.name: Increase Drone Count
upgrades.tooltip: Increases the number of drones that will launch when activated.

upgrades.name: Increase Drone Time to Live
upgrades.tooltip: Increases the fuel drones has, makes them live longer.

upgrades.name: Drone Speed
upgrades.tooltip: Increase the speed of drones.

upgrades.name: Harvester Drones
upgrades.tooltip: Deploys a drone from harvester for each X units moved (when drones ability is active)

upgrades.name: Harvester Drones: Travel Distance
upgrades.tooltip: Reduce distance harvesters have to travel before spawning a new drone.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner
upgrades.tooltip: Enhances gem spawning capabilities.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner: Numer of Gems
upgrades.tooltip: Number of gems spawned

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner: Cooldown
upgrades.tooltip: Number of gems spawned

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner: Second Ring
upgrades.tooltip: Addes a secondary ring with gems to spawn.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner: Harvesters
upgrades.tooltip: Also spawn gems around every harvester.

upgrades.name: Gem Spawner: Quality
upgrades.tooltip: Percent chance for each gem to create one with a higher quality and value instead.

upgrades.name: Multicast Abilities
upgrades.tooltip: Gives a chance for each ability to activate twices every time it activates.

upgrades.name: Gem Merger
upgrades.tooltip: Makes clumps of gems to merge when close to eachother and create a more valuable gem.

upgrades.name: Click Radius
upgrades.tooltip: No tooltip

upgrades.name: Click Magnetizer
upgrades.tooltip: No tooltip

upgrades.name: Ability Slot
upgrades.tooltip: Unlocks an additional ability slot.
